title: Spicy Ethiopian Bean Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew originating from Ethiopia, made with a variety of ingredients.

ingredients.name: Chilli paste
ingredients.notes: Use a spicy chilli paste for an authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Fry
ingredients.notes: Use vegetable or canola oil for frying

ingredients.name: Tangy
ingredients.notes: This blend includes ingredients like garlic, ginger, and spices

instructions: Heat the fry in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chilli paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the bean paste and stir to combine.
Add the tangy spice blend and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with injera or rice.
